criteria_verification.criterion_text: Language fallback strategy: requested -> auto-generated -> English -> first available
criteria_verification.evidence: 4-step fallback implemented in _fetch_with_fallback(): (1) auto-generated preferred language, (2) any English variant, (3) first available, (4) raise NoTranscriptFoundError. Tests: test_fallback_to_auto_generated, test_fallback_to_english, test_fallback_to_first_available, test_fallback_no_transcripts_raises.
